enum.name: TSource
enum.devnotes: redefine real to double precision floating point

class.name: TPlantRelatedSubMod
class.devnotes: abstract base type for plant submodel

field.name: fFirstPlantMod
field.devnotes: abstract type for plant related soil submodels

field.name: fPlantModel
field.devnotes: first plant model from a possible list of

class.name: TAbstractPlant
class.devnotes: Source of extinction coefficient / rc0 / Psi2 / Weff

field.name: fNextCrop
field.devnotes: base class for plant components interacting with soil components

field.name: fSoilMinMod
field.devnotes: pointer to soil water & nitroen module

devnotes.summary: THumeNumEntity is a base class for numerical entities in the model, such as variables and external values. It extends THumeEntity with properties for numerical values, units, and flags for plotting and output.

THumeNumEntity is a base class for numerical entities in the model, such as variables and external values. It extends THumeEntity with properties for numerical values, units, and flags for plotting and output.

THumeNumEntity is a base class for numerical entities in the model, such as variables and external values. It extends THumeEntity with properties for numerical values, units, and flags for plotting and output.

THumeNumEntity is a base class for numerical entities in the model, such as variables and external values. It extends THumeEntity with properties for numerical values, units, and flags for plotting and output.

THumeNumEntity is a base class for numerical entities in the model, such as variables and external values. It extends THumeEntity with properties for numerical values, units, and flags for plotting and output.

THumeNumEntity is a base class for numerical entities in the model, such as variables and external values. It extends THumeEntity with properties for numerical values, units, and flags for plotting and output.

field.name: Par_rc0
field.devnotes: water potential at which water uptake by the plant starts to decrease (only valid if SoilWaterModel uses Option Opt_Psi2=fromPlantModel)}

field.name: Par_ExtCoeffPAR
field.devnotes: Canopy resistance at potential transpiration (only valid if EvapotranspirationModel uses Option Opt_rc0=fromPlantModel)}

field.name: Par_Weff
field.devnotes: Extinction coefficient for PAR (only valid if EvapotranspirationModel uses Option Opt_Exk_Glob = fromPlantModel)}

field.name: pWLD_arr
field.devnotes: Effective rooting depth [cm] (only valid if SoilWaterModel uses Option Opt_Weff=fromPlantModel)}

field.name: OptWithRoots
field.devnotes: Pointer array to root length density data

property.name: ExtCoeffGlobRad
property.devnotes: Extinction coefficient for photosynthetically active radiation}

property.name: Weff
property.devnotes: Water potential at which water uptake by the plant starts to decrease}
